title: Reading - Part 4
instructions: Choose the correct sentence (A–F) to complete the gap in the text.
articleTitle: Working In A Café During Summer
article:
Last year I decided to try working in a café during summer. I was excited, but also nervous because I had never done anything similar before.

_____

During the first few days, everything felt unfamiliar. I had to meet new people, learn new routines and adapt quickly.

After some time, I started feeling more comfortable. I realised that making mistakes was a normal part of learning.

The experience also taught me how important patience can be. Some skills take much longer to develop than people expect.

Looking back now, I’m very glad I continued. I learned a lot about myself and became much more confident.

options.A: That experience completely changed my attitude.
options.B: In the end, the effort was definitely worth it.
options.C: At first, I thought I would find it easy.
options.D: Not everyone agreed with the decision immediately.
options.E: Fortunately, things improved after a few weeks.
options.F: Some moments were much more stressful than expected.

correctSentence: Not everyone agreed with the decision immediately.
explanation: The missing sentence connects logically with the ideas before and after the gap.
